name: Saga
description:
Einherjar Independent Solutions flagship frame, The Saga is a slow-moving exploration and unknown identification support mech. It comes equipped with systems that allows it to process immediate data in real-time allowing its pilot a full profile of anything within the mechs sensors.

Created by the manufacturer with the intent of being able to provide greenhorn pilots a mech that caters to a fully supportive role or in certain instances to allow new pilots to remain relatively far away from the frontlines of combat all the while still being able to provide combat tactical support this in turn allows more newer pilots to gain relative combat experience.

Statistically, a good number of Saga pilots aren't even combat trained, specifically during a recent product license climate survey by the manufacturer a good 71% of registered pilots who have taken the Saga License actually hail from professions that range from the academe scientist, researchers and the surprisingly wildlife survey rangers.

traits.name: SCRY
traits.description: 1/round, the Saga may take the Scan Quick Tech action as a free action, on a character or object within Sensors without the need of Line of Sight.

traits.name: ACTIVE PING
traits.description: The Saga ignores Line of Sight for its Tech Attacks against characters it has Scanned.

traits.name: INFORMATION HANDLER
traits.description: When the Saga scans a character, it always receives a constant update on the character's basic statistics which is its current HP and current Heat for the rest of the scene while it remains within its Sensor range.

core_system.name: OMEN RESULTS PREDICTION SYSTEM
core_system.active_effect: For the rest of this scene, 1/round, as a protocol, you give one allied character within Sensors +1 Accuracy on all Attacks, Checks, and Saves until the end of their next turn. You cannot provide this benefit if you are Jammed or Stunned. FULLA is not a true NHP and thus cannot enter cascade.
core_system.description:
At its core, the "OMEN" Results Prediction System is a collection of dedicated subroutines and analysis software designed to decode the unpredictable nature of outcomes across various situations and scenarios.
Through its intricate algorithms and onboard FULLA-CLASS COMP/CON processing capabilities, it harnesses the power of real-time information, and advanced analytics to provide a roadmap of probable results and probably solutions.
". . . what do you mean this thing is revolutionary? I just scratched up a Magic-8-Ball emulation program to make this system work you know, plus I was drunk then so. . .. I highly doubt this thing even works as intended?!"

name: Valkyrie
description:
Einherjar Independent Solutions designated air combat frame, The Valkyrie flies into the sky as it claims dominance to the teal tinged sky of Arpeggio the manufacturer's home world. The frame finds active use amongst ace pilots and air enthusiast who enjoy the mechs onboard full profile of armaments that make it an extremely deadly opponent in dogfights.

The inspiration for the frame comes from one of the manufacturers sponsored Pilot, Ms. Takao "Bright Day" Miyafuj, who has on several recorded cases “requested” or rather “insisted” the manufacturer to create a frame that hearkens back to pre-Cradle era jet fighters capable of streaking the skies unimpeded the result of said request is a generalist close air engagement frame.

traits.name: VTOL SYSTEM
traits.description: The Valkyrie moves normally in zero-g environments. In-atmosphere, it always hovers at a height of 1 space.

traits.name: DOGFIGHT
traits.description: 1/round, a hostile character within Line of Sight ends its movement, as a reaction you may Boost towards the hostile character. This movement ignores engagement and doesn’t provoke reactions.

actions.name: DOGFIGHT
actions.detail: As a reaction, you may Boost towards the hostile character. This movement ignores engagement and doesn’t provoke reactions.
actions.trigger: A hostile character within Line of Sight ends its movement

traits.name: AGGRESSIVE MANUEVERS
traits.description: 1/round, when the Valkyrie lands a critical hit, it may immediately Boost in a direction of its choice as a free action. This movement ignores engagement and doesn’t provoke reactions.

core_system.name: VOLUNDR WARFARE ARSENAL
core_system.active_effect:
For the rest of this scene, The Valkyrie gains access to all of its V.W.A. integrated weaponry it additionally gains the following benefits:
• The Valkyrie's VTOL System trait’s hover changes from it always hovers at a height of 1 space to no limit.
• When the Valkyrie would Barrage with its weapon mounts it may include as part of the Barrage any number of its V.W.A. integrated weapon/s.
core_system.description:
The V.W.A or VOLUNDR WARFARE ARSENAL, is a compliment of fully integrated weapons installed directly to the mech's core frame.
Activating the onboard systems allows the Valkyrie to escalate and phase change granting it increased efficiency making it a deadly combatant for a short period of time.
core_system.passive_effect: At the beginning of a scene, The Valkyrie chooses one of its V.W.A. integrated weapons, it has access to the selected integrated weapon for the rest of the scene. When the Valkyrie would Barrage with its weapon mounts it may include the selected V.W.A. integrated weapon as part of the Barrage.

name: Tyche
description:
Einherjar Independent Solutions colony expansion frame, the Tyche is renowned for its bulky appearance and downright sluggish movement in lieu of it carrying a multitude of systems, packages and a miniaturized schedule printer meant for setting up potential new colony's in frontier space.

Developed side by side with help from GMS, the Tyche rolls out as a field mobile base often employed by Far Field Teams when exploring new worlds and potential new habitable planets. Its overall construction allows it to weather most hostile environs and endemic life long enough to allow it to find a potential location worthy of being settled.

traits.name: TITANIC
traits.description: The Tyche can’t be pushed, pulled, knocked Prone, or knocked back by smaller characters. Additionally, adjacent allied characters can use the Tyche for hard cover.

traits.name: CUSTOM BLUEPRINTS
traits.description: Deployable/s deployed by the Tyche gain 4 + GRIT HP.

traits.name: CRANE ARM DELIVERY SYSTEM
traits.description: Whenever the Tyche deploys a Deployable, instead of deploying it adjacent to itself it may deploy it within its Sensors and Line of Sight. Each time it does so it immediately gains 1 Heat.

synergies.detail: The Tyche receives +1 difficulty on Agility checks and saves.

core_system.name: M.C.V.-S.S.
core_system.active_effect:
1/mission, as a protocol, you commence ground breaking and permanently deploy your frame into a fixed position. When activated, your mech slowly starts converting and unpacking, extending armor plates, creating structural walls and hardpoints as it starts turning itself into a functional structure of specific purpose and design.
Additionally, the following effects apply to you:
  • You gain Resistance to all damage from attacks that originate beyond range 3.
  • You become permanently Immobilized and gain immunity to being Grappled, Knockback, Prone, and all forms of movement. You cannot be moved by any means.
  • And you may now deploy your Deployable/s within Sensors and Line of Sight, ignoring adjacency restrictions (if it had any).
This system once activated cannot be deactivated by any means.
core_system.description:
The Mobile Colony Variable-Settlement System or M.C.V.-S.S. for short, in essence is a package of integrated systems and machines installed on the Tyche of which its primary purpose is to allow Far Field Teams, explorers and colonist to immediately be able to setup a reliable long lasting structure in a location allowing to jump start potential new colony sites or outpost.

The system spearheaded with collaborative work with GMS intends to provide Far Field Teams with a mech frame that allows for sustainable plans for colonial expansion, it comes with the core basic necessary systems and machines needed to maintain a small settlement while awaiting for arrival of additional raw materials and reinforcements.

"Often when new potential habitable worlds are found its always the Far Field Teams and unsung explorers and colonist who frontlines such endeavors, without them we would not be able to see new landscapes, meet new cultures and reconnect long thought to be lost connections with our kind. Truly much we are indebted to those who push to explore towards the great frontier."
core_system.passive_effect:
At the end of any scene the Tyche utilizes its Core Power, the Tyche fully becomes a Size 3 structure which will remain in place at this location. Talk with your GM to discuss the possible benefits and narrative impact that this new structure may provide at this location, listed below are some ideas that you may use to draw inspiration from:
  • It becomes a reliable outpost where your party may stop by from time to time.
  • It becomes a key founding structure that jump starts a community at this location.
  • It becomes a static defensive emplacement that hinders the local aggressive alien wildlife from repopulating the area.
  • It becomes a waypoint marker for other members of your group/enterprise/organization pointing towards your next destination.
After this you will be required to print a new mech. The Tyche (now a structure) can print you a one time Size 1/2 or Size 1 mech frame of your choice that you have License access to. Printing a mech this way still follows printing rules on Lancer Core Rulebook pg. 377.

name: Nereid
description:
From the design minds of Einherjar Independent Solutions the Nereid is a limited production chassis issued to NHP Specialist who are intent in the pursuit of study of NHPs and their varied applicability into society, industry and research. The chassis allows for the expanded installation of a handful of NHP clones allowing the pilot . . . .

BRING US WITH YOU, SO THAT WE MAY SEE, THE GREATER OUTDOORS, WHERE EVERYONE, FROLICKS FREE. . .

traits.name: AMBIENT ENSEMBLE
traits.description: The Nereid is able to install one additional NHP.

traits.name: SHARED VISION
traits.description: The Nereid may draw Line of Sight, Sensors and attacks (including Overwatch) from spaces occupied by its Holograms.

traits.name: FRAGILE
traits.description: The Nereid receives +1 difficulty on Hull checks and saves.

synergies.detail: The Nereid receives +1 difficulty on Hull checks and saves.

core_system.name: PROTOTYPE MINIATURIZED █ █ █ █ █ REPLICA
core_system.description:
>//REDACTED_02: FOR YOUR OWN SAFETY. . .
>//REDACTED_15: YOU NEED NOT KNOW MORE. . .
>//REDACTED_72: PILOT. . .
>//REDACTED_18: YOU SIMPLY NEED. . .
>//REDACTED_0Ω: TO TRUST US. . .

active_actions.name: PROJECT LEGION HOLOGRAM
active_actions.detail: 1/scene, as a full tech action, the Nereid, creates a Hologram/s of itself equal to the number of NHP's it has installed, within Sensors and Line of Sight of itself. The distinctive features of the Hologram/s are heavily influenced by the Nereid's onboard NHPs. The Legion Hologram/s inherit the same benefits the Gemini Hologram has.

core_system.passive_effect:
The Nereid is accompanied by a lone Gemini Hologram that it projects within Range 2 of it, You can only have 1 Gemini Hologram at any given time. The Hologram has the following benefits:
  • As a protocol, the Hologram moves spaces equal to your Speed, within Sensors and Line of Sight of you. If the Hologram moves outside of your Sensors or Line of Sight, it immediately dissipates. (any effect that blocks Line of Sight towards the Hologram dissipates the Hologram/s as well).
  • The Hologram is immune to all forms of damage and effects and they do not count as obstructions.
  • Hostile characters may attempt to dissipate the Hologram with a Free action contested System check while the Hologram is within their Sensors and Line of Sight.
  • Hostile characters who start their turn, move adjacent or end their turn adjacent of a Hologram must succeed on a Systems save, on a failure affected characters can only draw Line of Sight towards and beyond the the Hologram in a straight line and are Impaired until the end of the round.

passive_actions.name: PROJECT HOLOGRAM
passive_actions.detail: Project a Hologram within Range 2 of you.

name: İye
description:
From the design minds of Einherjar Independent Solutions the İye is a dedicated urban rapid response and relief frame specifically tailor made to handle disaster and calamity response, the frame bobs and weaves across debris and ruins to provide immediate assistance to those in need, a highly favored frame amongst civil servants.

The İye is a commonly utilized frame within the archipelago region of Arpeggio, much of its on field duties and track record centers around its niche application towards immediate repair and maintenance of critical infrastructure and its capacity to salvage nearly destroyed drones and sub-alterns. After all why wait until something gets destroyed when you can just repair it immediately at a lower cost.

traits.name: ALPHA UNITS
traits.description: 1/scene, The first Drone the İye deploys in a scene has 4 + GRIT Overshield.

traits.name: SALVAGER
traits.description: While the İye, is active on the scene, allied Drones, Deployables and Objects leave a wreck when it would be destroyed.

core_system.name: DISASTER AND CALAMITY REPAIR DRONE CREW
core_system.active_effect: 1/scene, as a quick action, allied Drone/s, Deployable/s and Object/s within Burst 2 of the İye regain their full HP. Additionally, If a wreck of an allied Drone/s, Deployable/s and Object/s is within Burst 2 of the İye it immediately gets repaired from being a wreck and it gains half its HP and an equal amount of Overshield.
core_system.description:
The İye comes equipped with EINS Type-9 "BLACKSMITH" and Type-10 "ARCHITECT" disaster and calamity repair drone crew, originally intended for providing civic assistance, the drone crew have grown popular due to its rather practical application and friendly appearance.
The blacksmith and architect drones are tailored made to carryout automatic repair duties towards nearby identified critically damaged infrastructure and assets in rural and developing areas at the same time it also allows for recovery of damaged, repairable or salvageable drones and the likes should it encounter any while performing its duties. Field reports additionally claim that the drones have a habit of going so far as to even attempt to return the salvaged drones back to IFF tagged owners of said drones.
core_system.passive_effect: While within Burst 2 of the İye, allied Drones, Deployables and Objects regain 2 HP at the end of the İye's turn.

name: Lalahon
description:
Affectionally called the "Dozer" by mercenaries and orbital drop pilots, the Lalahon is Einherjar Independent Solutions attempt at reviving an age old mechanical frame design from one of its subsidiary company, Lua Engineering Guild. Originally, the Lalahon was specifically used for civilian ground breaking projects and contracts for both residential and agricultural purposes however due to the rapid advancement of technology the frame became an outdated model of the past.

This current design now repurposed and retrofitted to take advantage of one of Lua Engineering Guilds propriety technology allows it to move forward deep into dangerous or contested locations with relative ease breaking through and laying a clear and safe path forward. Field combat wise the frame finds heavy use amongst theater commanders and urban defense garrisons who have purposefully utilized the frames bulky and wide disposition to function as a mobile breaching shield that once it reaches an optimal strategic location then switches over to provide effective perimeter control.

traits.name: GRENADIER
traits.description: 1/round, the Lalahon may throw one Grenade as though it has range 15, when the Lalahon throws a Grenade this way, it may throw up to one additional unique other Grenade as well as part of the initially thrown Grenade.

traits.name: HIGH-YIELD PACKAGE
traits.description: 1/round, the Lalahon may increase the Blast Size of a Grenade it throws by 1 (If it has the Blast template).

traits.name: CONCUSSIVE FORCE
traits.description: 1/round, the Lalahon may give +1 difficulty to a save it forced on another character via its Grenades or Mines if they are within Line of Sight.

traits.name: SLOW
traits.description: The Lalahon receives +1 difficulty on Agility checks and saves.

core_system.name: Mk. IV "POMPEII" BLAST CARAPACE WALL
core_system.active_effect: Until the start of your next turn, You prop your massive shield in front of you, preparing to forcibly plow the earth beneath it, you gain resistance to all damage including Heat and Burn, and gain immunity from effects from Mines, Difficult and Dangerous terrain. Additionally, any Difficult and Dangerous terrain (space) you pass through immediately ceases to be Difficult or Dangerous terrain. This action is Efficient, and refunds 1 Core Power at the end of any scene in which it’s used.
core_system.description:
The Mk.IV "POMPEII" Blast Carapace Wall, originally was designed by Lua Engineering Guild, as an architectural, engineering and structural improvement used for protecting structures and assets situated near active volcano regions, with the sole goal of reducing logistical repair demands and expenses.
EINS has made a purposeful license acquisition of the proprietary technology with the intent of "brute force practical application" or to be more precise in the words of the manufacturer's lead design engineer, Kaska Rosa as quoted:

". . . see they have a bunch of this wall segments sitting on their warehouse gathering dust last we visited, I propose we take (buy, is the intended meaning here, in terms of clarification for legal proprietary purposes) those wall segments, tig weld several reinforced plows on it, slap handlebars for good measure and convert it into a big ass movable plow-shield, its a win-win."

name: Diwata
description:
Another eccentric foray of Einherjar Independent Solutions to its mechanized frame lineup offered to its select clients and added to its active roster of frames, the Diwata is a curious long range nexus weaponry based artillery frame. That sports a rather "innovative" approach to its architectural design. It specializes in slowly ramping up its capabilities, as combat engagements continue to drag along making it an extremely deadly mech when given time to find its pace.

Favored by lone wolf hunters due to its ability to slowly increment and overload a weapon of its choice to deal staggering damage against a singular target at the cost of reactor integrity.

traits.name: NANITE CONVERSION
traits.description: Ranged weapons installed on the Diwata counts as Nexus weapons.

traits.name: OUTPUT SHIFT
traits.description: When the Diwata rolls for an Overcharge, it may reroll the result a second time but must take the second result (even if its worse).

synergies.detail: The Diwata receives +1 Difficulty on Engineering checks and saves.

traits.name: EXPOSED REACTOR
traits.description: The Diwata receives +1 difficulty on Engineering checks and saves.

core_system.name: "SOL" Nanite Reactor
core_system.active_effect: For the rest of the scene you gain the CRITICAL SHUNT reaction.
core_system.description:
Haphazardly designed and rebuilt from archaic references of a bygone era from Cradles old humanity research on energy production, the "SOL" Nanite Reactor is an attempted fusion of brutalist energy reactor design with nanite swarm application.
The result is an extremely large reactor that does not fit its base frame structure and a swingy tendency for the reactor to pendulum bounce its energy production from low to high output. Originally thought to be a failed effort it has found a renewed use in the field of combat by instead redirecting its energy production and tapping a force fed line into an armament installed on a mech.

active_actions.name: CRITICAL SHUNT
active_actions.detail: You may immediately clear all your Heat and add an equal amount as bonus damage to your current weapon. If the attack includes multiple targets only one target of your choice takes this specific bonus damage. After resolving dealt damage you immediately become Slowed until the start of your next turn.
active_actions.trigger: After firing your weapon and before rolling damage.

name: Howell
description:
A Raleigh alternative frame, The Howell is a prototype design chassis proposed and actualized by design engineers of EINS in coordination with IPS-N with the goal in mind of introducing a highly customizable and lightweight frame.

The Howell from the ground-up was designed and marketed to take advantage of its openness for armament customizability, specifically lightweight customizable modular munition cases and magazines.

Prominently utilized in frontier systems where standard munitions are scarce and resourceful pilots have to make do with whatever type of munitions they can find, the Howell's custom magazines allows for usage of any munition on any weapon. This unique feature greatly appealed to a market and for a time both EINS and IPS-N profited from the new found revenue source, until its appeal found a new market amongst criminals, privateers, hitmen, rogues and the likes.

traits.name: MARAUDER
traits.description:
Whenever the Howell:
● Fires or Reloads a Loading weapon or
● Expends a charge of a Limited weapon or system

It can immediately move 1 space in any direction of its choice as long as it isn’t Immobilized or Slowed. This movement ignores engagement and doesn’t provoke reactions.

traits.name: CUSTOM MAGAZINES
traits.description: One Loading weapon installed on the Howell gains another "charge" and can be fired twice before needing to be reloaded. During a FULL REPAIR, you may reselect a new Loading weapon to benefit from this Trait.

synergies.detail: One Loading weapon installed on the Howell gains another "charge" and can be fired twice before needing to be reloaded. During a FULL REPAIR, you may reselect a new Loading weapon to benefit from this Trait.

core_system.name: THE ARMS DEALER
core_system.active_effect: For the rest of the scene, your CUSTOM MAGAZINE trait now applies to all your installed Loading weapons. Additionally, upon activation of this Core Power you immediately reload all your unloaded Loading weapons.
core_system.description: "Now see here gentlemen, everything here is nothing but a big misunderstanding. I came here into this nice town of yours for a good drink to wash my dry gullet and sell my wares. I propose that we take a moment and solve all of this with coin or words."
